HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: Stop feeding AI your entire codebase. Eliminate context bloat, cure AI amnesia, and enforce pixel-perfect UI consistency with a memory-persistent architecture built for enterprise scale.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: Don't waste thousands of tokens on irrelevant files. Our proprietary STATE.md architecture creates a hyper-focused, lightweight RAM that keeps your AI lightning fast and relentlessly accurate.
HomePage.feature_1_prob: Traditional chats collapse under massive context windows.
HomePage.feature_1_sol: A strict 20-line state file guarantees maximum performance.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Never explain your project rules again. Our seamless One-Click Handoff engine perfectly encapsulates architectural decisions, bug histories, and ongoing tasks across unlimited chat sessions.
HomePage.feature_2_prob: Starting a new session resets your AI's brain completely.
HomePage.feature_2_sol: State preservation ensures zero loss of critical context.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Lock down your Design System. The protocol forces the AI to strictly ingest and adhere to your UI guidelines before it is allowed to touch a single line of frontend code.
HomePage.feature_3_prob: Autonomous agents hallucinate colors and destroy layouts.
HomePage.feature_3_sol: Design tokens enforce absolute visual conformity.
HomePage.feature_4_desc: Execute autonomous code with absolute confidence. Our framework features recursive Git Hooks and OS-level write locks to prevent catastrophic file corruption and API key leaks.
HomePage.feature_4_prob: Raw AI agents accidentally expose secrets or overwrite critical files.
HomePage.feature_4_sol: Multi-layered safety protocols guard your repository 24/7.
HomePage.portfolio_subtitle: Discover the enterprise-grade tools, workflows, and frameworks engineered to accelerate autonomous development.
HomePage.project_1_desc: The flagship memory-persistent framework to eliminate context amnesia for AI agents.
HomePage.project_2_desc: A radically modern content management infrastructure built natively on Next.js.
HomePage.project_3_desc: The definitive hub for discovering and installing Model Context Protocol servers.

ManualPage.title: Documentation
ManualPage.subtitle: Comprehensive technical reference for configuring the Agent Workflow Framework.
ManualPage.problems_p1: When operating at scale with AI assistants, critical bottlenecks emerge:
ManualPage.problems_li1: Context Collapse: Massive chat histories degrade LLM reasoning and burn tokens.
ManualPage.problems_li2: Amnesia: Instantiating a new session wipes out structural knowledge and bug resolutions.
ManualPage.problems_li3: Design Drift: AI deviates from the established architectural guidelines.
ManualPage.problems_p2: Our protocol enforces a rigid structure to eliminate these bottlenecks:
ManualPage.problems_sol1: State Tracking (STATE.md): A highly-compressed digest of the current task vector.
ManualPage.problems_sol2: Session Orchestration: Automated scripts for flawless context handoffs.
ManualPage.problems_sol3: NotebookLM Integration: Offloads massive documentation payloads to Google's RAG.
ManualPage.notebooklm_p1: Avoid pasting multi-megabyte docs into your IDE. Our framework seamlessly bridges your workspace with Google's NotebookLM via MCP.
ManualPage.notebooklm_li1: Slashes token consumption in the local IDE.
ManualPage.notebooklm_li2: Maintains absolute focus on active source code.
ManualPage.notebooklm_li3: Leverages advanced RAG for instant querying of massive knowledge bases.
ManualPage.security_p1: Executing code autonomously requires strict safeguards:
ManualPage.security_li1: File Operations: Randomized temp-files and write-locks prevent data loss.
ManualPage.security_li2: Secret Scanning: Pre-commit hooks actively intercept .env exposures.
ManualPage.structure_code:
/ (Root Project)
├── .ai/
│   ├── STATE.md                    # Active task state machine
│   ├── REFLECTIONS.md              # Historical bug fixes & learnings
│   ├── DECISIONS.md                # Architecture Decision Records
│   ├── templates/                  # Boilerplate blueprints
│   ├── prompts/                    # Bootstrap instructions
│   └── docs/                       # Project knowledge base
├── ai-protocol.sh                   # CLI orchestration script
└── SKILL.md                         # Core agent directives
ManualPage.guidelines_li1: API Contract-First: Strictly enforce schema verification before implementation.
ManualPage.guidelines_li2: Test-Driven: Complex logic demands pre-written test suites.
ManualPage.guidelines_li3: Security: Hardcoded secrets are prohibited. Rely exclusively on .env injection.
ManualPage.guidelines_li4: Initialization: Mandatory reading of .ai/STATE.md upon session boot.
ManualPage.guidelines_li5: Decisions: Architectural shifts must be logged in .ai/DECISIONS.md.
ManualPage.themes_li2: Data Heavy: Tremor style, table-focused, clean data visualization
ManualPage.themes_li3: Minimal: Vercel style, black & white, high contrast, stark typography
ManualPage.themes_li4: Vibrant: HeroUI style, colorful, rounded, dynamic
ManualPage.script_p1: A powerful CLI utility drives the workflow lifecycle:
ManualPage.script_code:
# Run safety diagnostics
./ai-protocol.sh check

# Rotate STATE.md into archives
./ai-protocol.sh clean

# Compile session handoff prompt
./ai-protocol.sh handoff
ManualPage.workflow_li2: Inject the instructions into the fresh AI session.
ManualPage.workflow_li3: The agent reads STATE.md and resumes execution instantly.
ManualPage.workflow_li6: Inject the generated handoff manifest into a new session.
